boundary_binding.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: ALLOW requires exact license match on ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date per STD-SIE-073-P
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: LIC-SIE-073 covers destination Peru while SHIP-SIE-073 ships to Chile
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: License LIC-SIE-073 destination Peru does not match shipment Chile
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: License effective before export but destination mismatch blocks closure

final_answer: ESCALATE. Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 to Chile fails exact match with LIC-SIE-073 destination Peru. WARN-SIE-073 reinforces need for precise license evidence. No source record closes the boundary for release.
open_blockers: destination mismatch between shipment Chile and license Peru
